chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 465 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1861/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Associate of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-Pakistan Railways. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, hence, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
